title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 701.320 - Violations, penalty
text:
701.320.  Violations, penalty. — 1.  Except as otherwise provided, violation of the provisions of sections 701.308, 701.309, 701.310, 701.311 and 701.316 is a class A misdemeanor.
  2.  Any lead inspector, risk assessor, lead abatement supervisor, lead abatement worker, project designer, or lead abatement contractor who engages in a lead abatement project while such person's license, issued under section 701.312, is under suspension or revocation is guilty of a class E felony.
(L. 1993 S.B. 232 § 11, A.L. 1998 H.B. 977 & 1608, A.L. 2005 S.B. 95, A.L. 2014 S.B. 491) 
Effective 1-01-17
